title: Polymorphism, Protocols, and Abstract Contracts · Spiral Review
summary: Support interchangeable storage, notification, pricing, and item-policy implementations. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a protocol-driven circulation application after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use behavior-based polymorphism where callers depend on supported operations rather than concrete class identity.
Define abstract base classes with required operations and optional shared behavior when nominal hierarchy is justified.
Define structural Protocol roles that match consumer needs and support static checking without forced inheritance.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""python-oop cumulative stakeholder program."""

from pathlib import Path
from typing import Any

# Add one tested, typed, inspectable program increment per activity.
